import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        # skip invalid token
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn dedup(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if not list.contains(result, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let a_dedup = dedup(a)
  let b_dedup = dedup(b)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a_dedup.len()
    match a_dedup.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b_dedup, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut inserted = false
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(curr)
      if not inserted and x <= curr
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, curr)
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      result = insert_sorted(result, x)
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn format_result(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  if xs.len() == 0
    "empty"
  else
    mut s = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < xs.len()
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        if i == 0
          s = "#{x}"
        else
          s = "#{s} #{x}"
        end
      when None
        # skip
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    s
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let ints1 = parse_ints(line1)
  let ints2 = parse_ints(line2)
  let inter = intersect(ints1, ints2)
  let sorted = sort_ints(inter)
  print(format_result(sorted))
end
